jobs.title: Factory Digitalization and Automation Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. How you'll make an impact Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) Manage technology suppliers and system integrators Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards Train end users and support change management activities Your background Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI \/ Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions Experience with data analysis and reporting tools Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione
Unisciti al nostro team di Molinazzo di Monteggio, Svizzera come ingegnere di digitalizzazione e automazione e supporta la trasformazione digitale della nostra fabbrica progettando, sviluppando e implementando soluzioni di automazione, digitalizzazione e miglioramento basate sui dati.

## Mansioni
- Analizzare processi produttivi e aziendali per identificare opportunità di automazione e digitalizzazione
- Progettazione e realizzazione di soluzioni per l'automazione dei processi (industriale o ufficio), flussi di lavoro digitali e processi senza carta, nonché raccolta e analisi dei dati di produzione
- Collaborare con i team Operazioni, IT, Qualità e Miglioramento continuo per definire requisiti funzionali e tecnici
- Sviluppare e mantenere cruscotti KPI (OEE, produttività, qualità, downtime) e sistemi di acquisizione dati (PLC, sensori, MES)
- Gestione di fornitori di tecnologia e integratori di sistema
- Garantire il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza, qualità e sicurezza informatica
- Utenti finali e attività di gestione dei cambiamenti di supporto

# Requisiti #
- Master o laurea in ingegneria (Automazione, Meccatronica, Informatica, Elettronica, o simili)
- Solida comprensione della logica di controllo e dell'automazione dei processi, digitalizzazione dei processi operativi
- Esperienza con sistemi MES, ERP o tracciabilità
- Conoscenza di Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, strumenti RPA (ad esempio: Power Automate) e soluzioni IoT industriali
- Esperienza con l'analisi dei dati e strumenti di reportistica
- Esperienza in ambienti industriali o industriali
- Inglese tecnico (scritto e parlato) e italiano almeno intermedio
- La familiarità delle metodologie Lean Six Sigma e dei sistemi di automazione industriale (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) è un vantaggio

# Cosa #
Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions.

## Mansioni
- Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities
- Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis
- Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements
- Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES)
- Manage technology suppliers and system integrators
- Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards
- Train end users and support change management activities

## Requisiti
- Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar)
- Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization
- Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems
- Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions
- Experience with data analysis and reporting tools
- Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments
- Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate
- Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage

## Cosa offriamo
- More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Mit unserem Team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Schweiz als Digitalisierungs- und Automatisierungsingenieur, unterstützen wir die digitale Transformation unserer Fabrik durch die Entwicklung, Entwicklung und Implementierung von Automatisierungs-, Digitalisierungs- und datengetriebenen Verbesserungslösungen. Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â Â.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe à Molinazzo di Monteggio, Suisse en tant qu'ingénieur Digitalisation & Automation et soutenez la transformation numérique de notre usine en concevant, développant et implémentant des solutions d'automatisation, de numérisation et d'amélioration des données.

Les hommes
- Analyser les processus de fabrication et d'affaires pour identifier les possibilités d'automatisation et de numérisation
- Concevoir et mettre en œuvre des solutions pour l'automatisation des processus (industriels ou de bureau), les flux de travail numériques et les processus sans papier, ainsi que la collecte et l'analyse des données de production
- Collaborer avec les équipes Opérations, TI, Qualité et Amélioration continue pour définir les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques
- Développer et entretenir des tableaux de bord KPI (EEE, productivité, qualité, temps d'arrêt) et des systèmes d'acquisition de données (PLC, capteurs, MES)
- Gérer les fournisseurs de technologie et les intégrateurs de systèmes
- Assurer le respect des normes de sécurité, de qualité et de cybersécurité
- Former les utilisateurs finaux et soutenir les activités de gestion du changement

## Requisiti
- Maîtrise ou baccalauréat en ingénierie (Automation, Mécatronique, Informatique, Électronique ou similaire)
- Compréhension solide de la logique de contrôle et de l'automatisation des processus, numérisation des processus opérationnels
- Expérience des systèmes MES, ERP ou de traçabilité
- Connaissance de Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, outils RPA (par exemple: Power Automate) et solutions IoT industrielles
- Expérience des outils d ' analyse et de communication des données
- Expérience dans les environnements industriels ou manufacturiers
- Anglais technique (écrit et parlé) et italien au moins intermédiaire
- Connaissance des méthodologies Lean Six Sigma et des systèmes d'automatisation industrielle (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) est un avantage

Cosa offriamo
- Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. How you'll make an impact Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs Identifying\/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables Your background Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure Team-player able to build and motivate a project team More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Siamo alla ricerca di un Project Manager per rafforzare il nostro Team nel nostro Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In questo ruolo si sta conducendo l'esecuzione di progetti di medie dimensioni principalmente relativi a trasformatori e reattori LV & MV e garantire che tutte le attività correlate siano svolte in conformità con la politica di Hitachi Energy, standard di qualità, requisiti di salute e sicurezza e ambiente. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere. Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese. ## Mansioni - Sviluppare programmi di progetto e determinare i requisiti delle risorse - Monitoraggio e reporting sullo stato dei progetti tra cui costi, tempi e personale - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di qualità interni ed esterni (ad esempio, International Standards Organization) - Gestire i progetti After-Sales assicurando il soddisfacimento delle esigenze del cliente - Identificare/risolvere ostacoli al completamento del progetto sul tempo e sul budget - maggio includono la gestione di progetti di trasformazione aziendale multipli e intercorrelati Su alcuni progetti, il lavoro può includere l'integrazione dei compiti del fornitore nel piano di progetto e il monitoraggio e la revisione dei fornitori consegnabili ## Requisiti - Ingegneria elettrica o ingegneria meccanica Background - 2-3 anni comprovata esperienza in Project Management con focus su Transformers e Reactors - Collaborazione con il diverso numero di stakeholder - Molto buona conoscenza dell'inglese e dell'italiano; qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus - Forte comunicatore, auto-driven e open-minded - Strutturato e organizzato a persona ## Contatto Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. ## Mansioni - Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements - Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing - Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) - Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs - Identifying/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget - May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) - On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables ## Requisiti - Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background - 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors - Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders - Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus - Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded - Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure - Team-player able to build and motivate a project team ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. ## Contatto Please submit your resume in English.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Projektmanager, um unser Team in unserem Business Unit Transformers, Ticino, zu stärken. In dieser Rolle führen Sie die Durchführung von mittelständischen Projekten vor allem im Zusammenhang mit LV & MV Transformers und Reactors und stellen sicher, dass alle damit verbundenen Aktivitäten in Übereinstimmung mit Hitachi Energiepolitik, Qualitätsstandards, Gesundheit und Sicherheit und Umweltanforderungen durchgeführt werden. Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können. Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein. Mansioni - Entwicklung von Projektplänen und Bestimmung von Ressourcenanforderungen - Überwachung und Berichterstattung über den Status von Projekten einschließlich Kosten, Zeit und Personal - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung interner und externer Qualitätsstandards (z.B. International Standards Organization) - Verwalten von After-Sales-Projekten durch die Sicherstellung der Erfüllung von Kundenbedürfnissen - Identifikation/Resolvieren von Hindernissen für das Projekt zur Zeit und zum Budget - Mai umfassen die Arbeit mit mehreren geschäftsbezogenen Projekten Bei einigen Projekten kann die Arbeit die Integration von Lieferantenaufgaben in den Projektplan und das Tracking und die Überprüfung von Lieferanten liefern. Requisiti - Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau Hintergrund - 2-3 Jahre bewährte Erfahrung im Projektmanagement mit Fokus auf Transformers und Reactors - Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Interessengruppen - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Englisch und Italienisch wachsen; alle anderen Sprachen sind ein Plus - Starker Kommunikationspartner, selbstfahrende und offen-gesinnte Mitarbeiter Â Contatto Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Nous sommes à la recherche d'un gestionnaire de projet pour renforcer notre équipe dans notre unité de transformation, Tessin. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigez l'exécution de projets de taille moyenne principalement liés à LV & MV Transformateurs et Réacteurs et vous assurez que toutes les activités connexes sont réalisées conformément à la politique Hitachi Energy, aux normes de qualité, à la santé et à la sécurité et aux exigences environnementales. Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. Veuillez soumettre votre curriculum vitae en anglais. ## Mansioni - Élaborer des calendriers de projets et déterminer les besoins en ressources - Suivi et établissement de rapports sur l'état d'avancement des projets, y compris les coûts, le calendrier et la dotation - Assurer le respect des normes de qualité internes et externes (p. ex., l'Organisation internationale de normalisation) - Gérer les projets après-vente en assurant la satisfaction des besoins des clients - Identifier et résoudre les obstacles à l'achèvement du projet dans les délais et le budget - Peut comprendre la gestion de projets multiples et interdépendants (y compris les projets de transformation des activités) - Sur certains projets, le travail peut inclure l'intégration des tâches des fournisseurs dans le plan du projet et le suivi et l'examen des produits livrables des fournisseurs ## Requisiti - Génie électrique ou génie mécanique Contexte - 2-3 ans d'expérience prouvée en gestion de projet avec l'accent sur les transformateurs et les réacteurs - Collaboration avec divers intervenants - Très bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'italien; toute autre langue est un plus - Communicateur fort, autonome et ouvert - Personne structurée et organisée ayant la capacité de travailler sous pression temporelle - Joueur d'équipe capable de construire et de motiver une équipe de projet ## Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. ## Contatto Veuillez soumettre votre CV en anglais.

jobs.title: R&D electrical engineer
jobs.description: The Opporutnity As new R&D Electrical Engineer, you will join our Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) network team in the Technology Center of HITACHI Energy. You will be part of a group of key people with specific expertise in the fields of electrical, structural, acoustic, thermo-mechanic and fluid-dynamics analyses, simulation and testing. As part of our global R&D community including Technology Centers and Research Centers worldwide, you will contribute to support all factories in the PG Dry, Traction and Distribution Transformers on innovative and challenging research projects. You will focus on developing new technologies and products, optimizing existing ones and on supporting different engineering offices around the world. How you will make an impact Study of current state of art in the field of 2D and 3D simulation of transformers Analysis of performance of different parameters of dry transformers by means of 2D and 3D electromagnetic FEM calculations Develop new automations for the assessment of products through electromagnetic simulations coupled with structural, thermomechanical and acoustic simulations Run feasibility studies, develop new technical concepts, design new products and simulate their expected performances Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies\/products Lead product and technology development projects in the field of Dry, Traction and Oil Distribution Transformer, delivering results on time and on budget at agreed scope and quality Support the transfer of technology and knowledge from R&D to engineering department by writing design rules, preparing trainings and collaborating with design tools team Provide technical support to other departments when needed (engineering, product management, marketing and sales etc.) Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Your background MSc + 1 years of experience in Electrical Engineering field PhD in Electrical Engineering is preferred Existing work experience in Electrical Engineering with particular focus on transformer design Background experience on acoustics of transformers. Advanced knowledge of transformer design and prediction of relevant performance such as leakage fields, stray losses, no-load losses, short-circuit forces, mutual inductances, and similar Experience in the finite element analysis (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM electromagnetic simulation tool) Knowledge of at least one of the following programming languages ( Python, Matlab, C#) Experience in electric testing of transformers Project management skills Action and result oriented mindset Innovation spirit, "out of the box" thinking More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefit programs to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us – in work and out. Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. During the recruitment process you will be given more specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione The Opporutnity Come nuovo ingegnere elettrico R&D, ti unirai al nostro team di rete Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) nel Centro tecnologico di HITACHI Energy. Sarete parte di un gruppo di persone chiave con competenze specifiche nei settori delle analisi, della simulazione e del test elettrico, strutturale, acustico, termomeccanico e fluidodinamico. Nell'ambito della nostra comunità R&D globale, tra cui Technology Centers e Research Centers in tutto il mondo, contribuirai a supportare tutte le fabbriche nei trasformatori di PG Dry, Traction e Distribution su progetti di ricerca innovativi e stimolanti. Ti concentrerai sullo sviluppo di nuove tecnologie e prodotti, ottimizzando quelli esistenti e supportando diversi uffici ingegneristici in tutto il mondo. ## Mansioni -& Studio dell'attuale stato d'arte nel campo della simulazione 2D e 3D dei trasformatori - Analisi delle prestazioni di diversi parametri dei trasformatori a secco per mezzo di calcoli FEM elettromagnetici 2D e 3D - Sviluppare nuove automazioni per la valutazione dei prodotti attraverso simulazioni elettromagnetiche accoppiate con simulazioni strutturali, termomeccaniche e acustiche - Eseguire studi di fattibilità, sviluppare nuovi concetti tecnici, progettare nuovi prodotti e simulare le prestazioni previste - - Vivere i valori fondamentali di sicurezza e integrità di Hitachi Energy, il che significa assumersi la responsabilità delle proprie azioni mentre si occupano dei suoi colleghi e degli affari. ## Requisiti - Il tuo background MSc + 1 anni di esperienza nel campo dell'ingegneria elettrica - Il dottorato in ingegneria elettrica è preferito - Esperienza di lavoro esistente in ingegneria elettrica con particolare attenzione al design del trasformatore - Esperienza di sfondo sull'acustica dei trasformatori. - Conoscenza avanzata del design del trasformatore e predizione delle prestazioni rilevanti come i campi di fuga, le perdite di stray, le perdite di no-load, le forze di cortocircuito, le induttanze reciproche e simili - Esperienza nell'analisi degli elementi finiti (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM strumento di simulazione elettromagnetica) - Conoscenza di almeno uno dei seguenti linguaggi di programmazione ( Python, Matlab, C#) - Esperienza nella sperimentazione elettrica dei programmi di gestione del progetto - Capacità di gestione - Vogliamo che tu prosperi veramente con noi – nel lavoro e fuori. I nostri programmi di beneficio dei dipendenti sono su misura per ogni paese, a seconda della posizione di lavoro e grado di lavoro. Durante il processo di reclutamento vi verranno fornite informazioni più specifiche sul programma di beneficio dei dipendenti che offre nel vostro paese di lavoro previsto.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The Opporutnity As new R&D Electrical Engineer, you will join our Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) network team in the Technology Center of HITACHI Energy. You will be part of a group of key people with specific expertise in the fields of electrical, structural, acoustic, thermo-mechanic and fluid-dynamics analyses, simulation and testing. As part of our global R&D community including Technology Centers and Research Centers worldwide, you will contribute to support all factories in the PG Dry, Traction and Distribution Transformers on innovative and challenging research projects. You will focus on developing new technologies and products, optimizing existing ones and on supporting different engineering offices around the world. ## Mansioni - Study of current state of art in the field of 2D and 3D simulation of transformers - Analysis of performance of different parameters of dry transformers by means of 2D and 3D electromagnetic FEM calculations - Develop new automations for the assessment of products through electromagnetic simulations coupled with structural, thermomechanical and acoustic simulations - Run feasibility studies, develop new technical concepts, design new products and simulate their expected performances - Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies/products - Lead product and technology development projects in the field of Dry, Traction and Oil Distribution Transformer, delivering results on time and on budget at agreed scope and quality - Support the transfer of technology and knowledge from R&D to engineering department by writing design rules, preparing trainings and collaborating with design tools team - Provide technical support to other departments when needed (engineering, product management, marketing and sales etc.) - Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. ## Requisiti - Your background MSc + 1 years of experience in Electrical Engineering field - PhD in Electrical Engineering is preferred - Existing work experience in Electrical Engineering with particular focus on transformer design - Background experience on acoustics of transformers. - Advanced knowledge of transformer design and prediction of relevant performance such as leakage fields, stray losses, no-load losses, short-circuit forces, mutual inductances, and similar - Experience in the finite element analysis (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM electromagnetic simulation tool) - Knowledge of at least one of the following programming languages ( Python, Matlab, C#) - Experience in electric testing of transformers - Project management skills - Action and result oriented mindset - Innovation spirit, "out of the box" thinking ## Cosa offriamo - More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefit programs to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us – in work and out. Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. During the recruitment process you will be given more specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Die Opporutnity Als neuer R&D-Elektroniker begleiten Sie unser Netzwerkteam Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) im Technologiezentrum von HITACHI Energy. Sie werden Teil einer Gruppe von Schlüsselpersonen mit spezifischem Know-how in den Bereichen elektrische, strukturelle, akustische, thermomechanische und fluiddynamische Analysen, Simulation und Tests sein. Im Rahmen unserer weltweiten FuE-Gemeinschaft einschließlich Technologiezentren und Forschungszentren weltweit werden Sie dazu beitragen, alle Fabriken der PG Dry, Traction and Distribution Transformers zu innovativen und anspruchsvollen Forschungsprojekten zu unterstützen. Sie konzentrieren sich auf die Entwicklung neuer Technologien und Produkte, die Optimierung bestehender Technologien und die Unterstützung verschiedener Ingenieurbüros weltweit. Tralaboring - Studie des aktuellen Standes der Technik auf dem Gebiet der 2D- und 3D-Simulation von Transformatoren - Analyse der Leistung von verschiedenen Parametern von Trockentransformatoren mittels 2D- und 3D-Elektronik-FEM-Berechnungen - Entwicklung neuer Automatisierungen für die Bewertung von Produkten durch elektromagnetische Simulationen in Verbindung mit strukturellen, thermomechanischen und akustischen Simulationen - Führen Sie Machbarkeitsstudien, entwickeln neue technische Konzepte, neue Produkte und simulieren - Die Kernwerte von Sicherheit und Integrität von Living Hitachi Energy, was bedeutet, die Verantwortung für Ihre eigenen Aktionen zu übernehmen, während Sie sich um Ihre Kollegen und das Geschäft kümmern. Requisiti - Ihr Hintergrund MSc + 1 Jahre Erfahrung im Bereich Elektrotechnik - PhD in Elektrotechnik ist bevorzugt - bestehende Arbeitserfahrung in Elektrotechnik mit besonderem Fokus auf Transformator-Design - Hintergrunderfahrung auf Akustik von Transformatoren. - Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse der Transformator-Design und Vorhersage relevanter Leistung wie Streufelder, Streuverluste, Leerlastverluste, Kurzschlusskräfte, gegenseitige Induktivitäten und ähnliches - Erfahrung in der endlichen Elementanalyse (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM elektromagnetische Simulationstool) - Kenntnisse von mindestens einer der folgenden Programmiersprachen (Python, Matlab, C#) - Erfahrung in der elektrischen Prüfung von Transformatoren - Projektmanagement-Fähigkeit - Aktion und Geistiges Ergebnis Wir wollen, dass Sie mit uns wirklich gedeihen – in der Arbeit und draußen. Unsere Mitarbeiter-Leistungsprogramme sind auf jedes Land zugeschnitten, je nach Standort der Beschäftigung und Jobklasse. Während des Rekrutierungsprozesses erhalten Sie genauere Informationen über das Leistungsangebot an Arbeitnehmern in Ihrem vorgesehenen Beschäftigungsland.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opporutnity En tant que nouvel ingénieur électrique R & D, vous rejoindrez notre équipe réseau Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) au Centre de Technologie de HITACHI Energy. Vous ferez partie d'un groupe de personnes clés ayant une expertise spécifique dans les domaines de l'analyse, de la simulation et des essais électriques, structurels, acoustiques, thermomécaniques et fluidiques. Dans le cadre de notre communauté mondiale de R-D, y compris les centres technologiques et les centres de recherche dans le monde entier, vous contribuerez à soutenir toutes les usines des transformateurs PG Dry, Traction et Distribution sur des projets de recherche innovants et stimulants. Vous vous concentrerez sur le développement de nouvelles technologies et de nouveaux produits, l'optimisation des technologies existantes et le soutien de différents bureaux d'ingénierie à travers le monde. ## Mansioni - Étude de l'état actuel des connaissances dans le domaine de la simulation 2D et 3D des transformateurs - Analyse de la performance des différents paramètres des transformateurs secs au moyen de calculs 2D et 3D électromagnétiques FEM - Développer de nouvelles automatisations pour l'évaluation des produits par des simulations électromagnétiques couplées à des simulations structurales, thermomécaniques et acoustiques - Effectuer des études de faisabilité, élaborer de nouveaux concepts techniques, concevoir de nouveaux produits et simuler leurs performances attendues - Organiser des activités de prototypage et d'essai pour valider les nouvelles technologies/produits - Projets de développement de produits et de technologies de pointe dans le domaine du transformateur de distribution de produits secs, de traction et d'huile, produire des résultats en temps et en budget à une portée et une qualité convenues - Appuyer le transfert de technologie et de connaissances de la R-D au département d'ingénierie en écrivant des règles de conception, en préparant des formations et en collaborant avec l'équipe d'outils de conception - Fournir un soutien technique à d'autres départements au besoin (ingénierie, gestion des produits, commercialisation et ventes, etc.) - Les valeurs fondamentales de sécurité et d'intégrité de Living Hitachi Energy, c'est-à-dire prendre en charge vos propres actions tout en prenant soin de vos collègues et de l'entreprise. ## Requisiti - Vos antécédents MSc + 1 ans d'expérience en génie électrique - PhD en génie électrique est préféré - Expérience de travail existante en génie électrique avec un accent particulier sur la conception des transformateurs - Expérience de fond sur l'acoustique des transformateurs. - Connaissance avancée de la conception des transformateurs et de la prédiction des performances pertinentes telles que les champs de fuite, les pertes perdues, les pertes sans charge, les forces de court-circuit, les inductances mutuelles, et similaires - Expérience dans l'analyse des éléments finis (ANSYS, COMSOL, outil de simulation électromagnétique FEM) - Connaissance d'au moins un des langages de programmation suivants (Python, Matlab, C#) - Expérience dans les essais électriques des transformateurs - Compétences en gestion de projet - Action et esprit d'entreprise - Esprit d'innovation, pensée « hors de la boîte » ## Cosa offriamo - Plus sur nous Nous sommes fiers d'offrir une gamme holistique de programmes d'avantages concurrentiels pour soutenir votre bien-être financier, physique et mental et votre développement personnel. Nous voulons que vous prospérez vraiment avec nous – dans le travail et dehors. Nos programmes d'avantages sociaux des employés sont adaptés à chaque pays, selon le lieu d'emploi et le niveau d'emploi. Au cours du processus de recrutement, vous recevrez des renseignements plus précis sur le programme d'avantages sociaux des employés offert dans votre pays d'emploi prévu.

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere elettrico – Standard Compliance Expert per trasformatori a secco 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.en: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.de: Electrical Ingenieur – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur électrique – Expert en conformité avec les normes pour les transformateurs à sec 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team per guidare l'implementazione degli ultimi standard interni ed esterni nei nostri Dry Transformers in tutte le fabbriche di HUB Europe. Questo ruolo vi offre un'opportunità emozionante per ampliare le vostre competenze in diverse discipline e funzioni, impegnarsi in progetti dinamici e costruire una forte rete professionale sia all'interno che all'esterno della nostra organizzazione. ## Mansioni Come farete un impatto - Essere un membro attivo di International Standards Committees, rimanere aggiornati con cambiamenti e requisiti emergenti e influenzare lo sviluppo degli standard - Supporto Product Management nello sviluppo e nell'attuazione della nostra Global Technology Platform, impegnando nella definizione dei requisiti e sostenendo le fasi di rollout - Lavorare con team di varie funzioni, tra cui Ingegneria, Operazioni e Qualità. - No. Istituire e mantenere sia le reti interne che esterne per facilitare lo scambio di informazioni - Superare le operazioni tra più fabbriche e lavorare verso l'armonizzazione operativa - Assicurare l'effettiva implementazione di standard interni ed esterni all'interno delle nostre Power Transformers Units in Europe conducendo audit, identificando le lacune e facilitando la loro risoluzione - Responsabile per la comunicazione di aggiornamenti, fornire sessioni di formazione eccellenti e fornire assistenza tecnica ai colleghi di standard.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. ## Mansioni How you'll make an impact - Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development - Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases - Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. - You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange - Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization - Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution - Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions - Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders ## Requisiti Your background - Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) - About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field - Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams - Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations - Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work - L6S green belt is preferred - Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships - Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken ## About us - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Nehmen Sie an unserem Team teil, um die Umsetzung der neuesten internen und externen Standards in unseren Dry Transformers in allen Fabriken in HUB Europe voranzutreiben. Diese Rolle bietet Ihnen eine spannende Gelegenheit, Ihr Know-how über verschiedene Disziplinen und Funktionen zu erweitern, dynamische Projekte zu engagieren und ein starkes professionelles Netzwerk sowohl innerhalb als auch außerhalb unserer Organisation aufzubauen. In den Warenkorb Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben - Seien Sie aktives Mitglied der International Standards Committees, bleiben Sie auf dem neuesten Stand mit neuen Änderungen und Anforderungen und beeinflussen Standards Entwicklung - Support Product Management bei der Entwicklung und Umsetzung unserer Global Technology Platform durch die Einbeziehung von Anforderungen Definition und Unterstützung der Rollout Phasen - Arbeiten Sie mit Teams aus verschiedenen Funktionen, einschließlich Engineering, Operations und Qualität. - Ja. Sie werden interne und externe Netzwerke einrichten und pflegen, um den Informationsaustausch zu erleichtern - Operationen in mehreren Fabriken zu überwachen und zur operativen Harmonisierung zu arbeiten - Sicherstellung der effektiven Umsetzung von internen und externen Standards in unseren Power Transformers Units in Europa durch Audits, Identifizierung von Lücken und Erleichterung ihrer Auflösung - verantwortlich für die Kommunikation von Updates, Bereitstellung von Schulungen und technische Anleitungen für Kollegen zu Standards Compliance-bezogene Fragen - Repräsentieren Sie unser Unternehmen in standardsbezogenen Diskussionen mit Kunden.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe pour conduire la mise en œuvre des dernières normes internes et externes dans nos transformateurs à sec dans toutes les usines de HUB Europe. Ce rôle vous offre une occasion passionnante d'élargir votre expertise dans diverses disciplines et fonctions, de participer à des projets dynamiques et de bâtir un solide réseau professionnel au sein et à l'extérieur de notre organisation. Les hommes Comment vous allez avoir un impact - Soyez un membre actif des Comités internationaux de normalisation, restez informé des nouveaux changements et exigences et influencez l'élaboration de normes - Supportez la gestion des produits dans le développement et la mise en oeuvre de notre plateforme technologique mondiale en participant à la définition des exigences et en soutenant les phases de déploiement - Travaillez avec des équipes de différentes fonctions, y compris l'ingénierie, les opérations et la qualité. - Oui. Vous établirez et entretenirez des réseaux internes et externes pour faciliter l'échange d'information - Superviser les opérations dans plusieurs usines et travailler à l'harmonisation opérationnelle - Assurer la mise en oeuvre efficace des normes internes et externes au sein de nos unités de transformateurs de puissance en Europe en procédant à des audits, en identifiant les lacunes et en facilitant leur résolution - Responsable de la communication des mises à jour, de la prestation de séances de formation et de l'orientation technique aux collègues sur les questions liées à la conformité - Représenter notre société dans les discussions liées aux normes avec les clients et les intervenants de l'industrie ## Requisi Votre expérience - Maîtrise en génie (on préfère la maîtrise en électronique ou en mécanique) - Environ 10 à 15 ans d'expérience dans le domaine de la transformation de puissance - Expérience en gestion de projet et en gestion d'équipes fonctionnelles - Connaissance approfondie de la conception, de la fabrication, des essais et des opérations des transformateurs - Intérêt pour les outils d'IA et leur intégration potentielle dans son travail - La ceinture verte L6S est préférée - Excellente sensibilité interculturelle et capacité de développer et de maintenir des relations de travail saines - Fortes compétences en communication, couramment en anglais, à la fois écrite.

jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer - Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Unirti al nostro team di ingegneria dei trasformatori a secco, aiuterai a creare progetti di nuova generazione che migliorano la sicurezza, l'efficienza e la sostenibilità nelle applicazioni critiche di potenza. Collaborerai strettamente con R&D, produzione, qualità e catena di approvvigionamento per tradurre le esigenze dei clienti in soluzioni produttibili e vederle attraverso la prototipazione, il test di tipo e la rilascio in serie. Lavorando su progetti globali e standard, approfondirai la tua conoscenza dei sistemi di isolamento, del disegno elettromagnetico e del rendimento termico mentre contribuirai alla digitalizzazione dei nostri processi di progettazione. Questo è un ruolo di grande impatto dove il tuo lavoro consente direttamente l'elettricità affidabile per le industrie e le comunità in tutto il mondo. Come farai un impatto Guida lo sviluppo delle specifiche e dei modelli di progettazione, assicurandoti che rispettino tutte le norme e le regolamentazioni rilevanti Conduci revisioni e verifiche di progettazione approfondite, implementando modifiche per elevare la qualità del progetto Monitora e gestisci i tempi di progetto, assicurandoti che i milestone di progettazione siano raggiunti e i progetti siano consegnati in tempo Conduci valutazioni di rischio, sviluppa strategie di mitigazione e cerca opportunità per innovazioni di progettazione Interagisci con i clienti per catturare e incorporare le loro osservazioni nelle soluzioni di progettazione, migliorando la soddisfazione dei clienti Collabora con l'equipe di catena di approvvigionamento per assicurarti che le progettazioni siano produttibili e a costo ottimale, selezionando materiali e componenti ottimali Prepara e mantiene documentazione dettagliata che supporta i processi di progettazione e facilita la condivisione delle conoscenze Identifica e implementa miglioramenti continui della progettazione basati sui risultati dei test e le migliori prassi dell'industria, migliorando la qualità e l'efficienza Il tuo background Laurea in ingegneria elettrica o campo correlato 2-5 anni di esperienza in ingegneria di progettazione elettrica di trasformatori a secco Eccellenti abilità analitiche e di risoluzione dei problemi Capacità di lavorare sia in modo autonomo che come parte di un team multidisciplinare L'inglese è obbligatorio, l'italiano è utile Atteggiamento proattivo, motivato e con un forte senso di proprietà Aperto al cambiamento, alle osservazioni e all'auto-improvement continuo. Di più su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare il tuo rendimento personale e professionale mentre creiamo un ambiente in cui tutti gli impiegati possano sviluppare le loro abilità e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Chance Bist du bereit, Teil unseres Teams für Trockentransformatoren zu werden? Du wirst dabei helfen, die nächste Generation von Entwürfen zu schaffen, die die Sicherheit, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit in kritischen Stromanwendungen verbessern. Du wirst eng mit R&D, Produktion, Qualitätsmanagement und Lieferkette zusammenarbeiten, um Kundenanforderungen in herstellbare Lösungen umzusetzen und sie durch Prototypen, Typentests und Serienauslieferung zu begleiten. Bei der Arbeit an globalen Projekten und Standards wirst du deine Kenntnisse in Isolationsystemen, elektromagnetischen Entwürfen und thermischer Leistung vertiefen und zum digitalen Wandel unserer Entwurfsprozesse beitragen. Dies ist ein hochrangiger Job, bei dem dein Werk direkt zuverlässigen Strom für Industrie und Gemeinschaften weltweit ermöglicht. Wie wirst du einen Unterschied machen Leite die Entwicklung von Entwurfspezifikationen und -modellen, die alle relevanten Normen und Vorschriften erfüllen Durchführe gründliche Entwurfsprüfungen und -verifikationen, um Änderungen vorzunehmen, um die Projektqualität zu verbessern Überwache und gestalte Projekttermine, um sicherzustellen, dass Entwurfsmeilensteine erreicht werden und Projekte pünktlich abgeschlossen werden Durchführe Risikobewertungen, entwickle Strategien zur Risikominderung und suche nach Möglichkeiten für Entwurfsinnovationen Interagiere mit Kunden, um ihre Rückmeldungen in Entwurfslösungen zu integrieren und die Kundenzufriedenheit zu verbessern Arbeite mit der Lieferkette zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass Entwürfe herstellbar und kosteneffizient sind, indem du optimale Materialien und Komponenten auswählst Vorbereite und halte detaillierte Dokumentation bereit, die Entwurfsprozesse unterstützt und Wissen teilt Identifiziere und implementiere kontinuierliche Entwurfsverbesserungen auf der Grundlage von Testergebnissen und Branchenbesten Praktiken, um Qualität und Effizienz zu verbessern Dein Hintergrund Diplom in Elektrotechnik oder einem verwandten Fach 2-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Elektrotechnik-Entwicklung von Trockentransformatoren Ausgezeichnete analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten Fähigkeit, sowohl unabhängig als auch als Teil eines multidisziplinären Teams zu arbeiten Englisch ist obligatorisch, Deutsch ist wünschenswert Proaktives Verhalten, motiviert und mit einem starken Sinn für Eigentum Offen für Veränderungen, Rückmeldungen und kontinuierliche Verbesserung. Mehr über uns Unsere flexible Arbeitspraktiken helfen dir, deine persönliche und berufliche Leistung zu optimieren, während wir ein Umfeld schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Rejoins notre équipe d'ingénierie de transformateurs sèches et aide à créer des projets de nouvelle génération qui améliorent la sécurité, l'efficacité et la durabilité dans les applications critiques de l'énergie. Tu collaboreras étroitement avec R&D, production, qualité et chaîne d'approvisionnement pour traduire les besoins des clients en solutions réalisables et les accompagner à travers la prototypage, les tests de type et la mise en série. En travaillant sur des projets mondiaux et des normes, tu approfondiras tes connaissances en systèmes d'isolement, en conception électromagnétique et en performance thermique tout en contribuant à la numérisation de nos processus de conception. C'est un rôle d'impact important où ton travail permet directement l'électricité fiable pour les industries et les communautés à l'échelle mondiale. Comment tu feras une différence Dirige le développement de spécifications et de modèles de conception, en veillant à ce qu'ils répondent à toutes les normes et réglementations pertinentes Conduis des examens et des vérifications de conception approfondis, en mettant en œuvre des modifications pour améliorer la qualité du projet Surveille et gère les délais de projet, en veillant à ce que les jalons de conception soient atteints et que les projets soient livrés à temps Conduis des évaluations de risque, développe des stratégies de réduction des risques et cherche des opportunités pour des innovations de conception Interagis avec les clients pour capturer et intégrer leurs commentaires dans les solutions de conception, améliorant la satisfaction des clients Collabore avec l'équipe de chaîne d'approvisionnement pour veiller à ce que les conceptions soient réalisables et rentables, en sélectionnant des matériaux et des composants optimaux Prépare et maintiens une documentation détaillée qui soutient les processus de conception et facilite la partage des connaissances Identifie et met en œuvre des améliorations continues de la conception sur la base des résultats des tests et des meilleures pratiques de l'industrie, améliorant la qualité et l'efficacité Ton arrière-plan Diplôme en électrotechnique ou un domaine connexe 2-5 ans d'expérience en ingénierie de conception électrotechnique de transformateurs sèches Excellentes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes Capacité à travailler de manière autonome et en tant que membre d'une équipe multidisciplinaire Français est obligatoire, allemand est utile Attitude proactive, motivée et avec un fort sens de propriété Ouverte à la modification, aux commentaires et à l'amélioration continue. En savoir plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles t'aideront à optimiser ta performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.
